```text
    18→
    19→type Page = 'editor' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'diff'
    20→type ThemeMode = 'system' | 'light' | 'dark'
    21→
    22→function useSystemColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    23→  const [scheme, setScheme] = useState<ColorScheme>(() =>
    24→    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches
    25→      ? 'dark'
    26→      : 'light',
    27→  )
    28→
    29→  useEffect(() => {
    30→    const mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    31→    const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) =>
    32→      setScheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
    33→    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    34→    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    35→  }, [])
    36→
    37→  return scheme
    38→}
    39→
    40→export function App() {
    41→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    42→    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    43→    return hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    44→      ? hash
    45→      : 'editor'
    46→  })
    47→  const [themeMode, setThemeMode] = useState<ThemeMode>('system')
    48→  const systemScheme = useSystemColorScheme()
    49→
    50→  const resolved: ColorScheme =
    51→    themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode
    52→
    53→  const dataTheme = useMemo(
    54→    () => (themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode),
    55→    [systemScheme, themeMode],
    56→  )
    57→
    58→  const cycleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    59→    setThemeMode((m) => {
    60→      if (m === 'system') return 'light'
    61→      if (m === 'light') return 'dark'
    62→      return 'system'
    63→    })
    64→  }, [])
    65→
    66→  const themeLabel =
    67→    themeMode === 'system' ? 'System' : themeMode === 'light' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'
    68→  const ThemeIcon =
    69→    themeMode === 'system' ? Monitor : themeMode === 'light' ? Sun : Moon
    70→
    71→  useEffect(() => {
    72→    const handleHashChange = () => {
    73→      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    74→      const validPage =
    75→        hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    76→          ? hash
    77→          : 'editor'
    78→      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    82→    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    83→  }, [])
    84→
    85→  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    86→    window.location.hash = page
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  const mockSaveSnapshot = useCallback(async (snapshot: object) => {
    90→    const json = JSON.stringify(snapshot)
    91→    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' })
    92→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
    93→    console.log('[TldrawConfig] saveSnapshot → blob URL:', url)
    94→    return url
    95→  }, [])
    96→
    97→  return (
    98→    <ThemeContext value={resolved}>
    99→      <TldrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
   100→        <DialogStackProvider>
   101→          <div className="app" data-theme={dataTheme}>
   102→            <header className="app-header">
   103→              <div className="app-header-content">
   104→                <div>
   105→                  <h1 className="app-title">@haklex/rich-editor</h1>
   106→                  <p className="app-subtitle">
   107→                    Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
   108→                  </p>
   109→                </div>
   110→                <nav className="app-nav">
   111→                  <button
   112→                    className={
   113→                      currentPage === 'editor'
   114→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   115→                        : 'nav-tab'
   116→                    }
   117→                    onClick={() => navigate('editor')}
   118→                  >
   119→                    Editor
   120→                  </button>
   121→                  <button
   122→                    className={
   123→                      currentPage === 'nodes'
   124→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   125→                        : 'nav-tab'
   126→                    }
   127→                    onClick={() => navigate('nodes')}
   128→                  >
   129→                    Node Showcase
   130→                  </button>
   131→                  <button
   132→                    className={
   133→                      currentPage === 'presets'
   134→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   135→                        : 'nav-tab'
   136→                    }
   137→                    onClick={() => navigate('presets')}
   138→                  >
   139→                    Presets
   140→                  </button>
   141→                  <button
   142→                    className={
   143→                      currentPage === 'diff'
   144→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   145→                        : 'nav-tab'
   146→                    }
   147→                    onClick={() => navigate('diff')}
   148→                  >
   149→                    Diff
   150→                  </button>
   151→                  <div className="nav-divider" />
   152→                  <button

   154→                    onClick={cycleTheme}
   155→                    title={themeLabel}
   156→                  >
   157→                    <ThemeIcon size={18} />
   158→                  </button>
   159→                </nav>
   160→              </div>
   161→            </header>
   162→
   163→            <main className="app-main">
   164→              {currentPage === 'editor' && <EditorPage />}
   165→              {currentPage === 'nodes' && <NodeShowcase />}
   166→              {currentPage === 'presets' && <PresetsPage />}
   167→              {currentPage === 'diff' && <DiffPage />}
   168→            </main>
   169→          </div>

   171→      </TldrawConfigProvider>
   172→    </ThemeContext>
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-26 16:53:01Z)**_

Perfect. I have the full content of both files. Here's the complete information:

## File 1: EditorPage.tsx (rich-editor-demo main editor component)

**Location**: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/EditorPage.tsx`

This file renders the demo editor. At lines 209-220, it mounts `ShiroEditor` with various props (variant, theme, onChange callback, etc.). `ShiroEditor` is imported from `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` (line 2) and handles all plugin setup internally.

## File 2: ShiroEditor.tsx (Main Shiro editor component with plugin wiring)

**Location**: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx`

This is where the plugin architecture is fully wired:

```typescript
export function ShiroEditor({
  extraNodes,
  actions,
  children,
  selfHostnames,
  ...props
}: ShiroEditorProps) {
  // ... setup ...
  
  return (
    <RichEditor
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
      actions={
        <>
          <SlashMenuPlugin />  // ← Line 84
          {actions}
        </>
      }
    >
      <BlockHandlePlugin />
      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
      <TldrawPlugin />
      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
      <PasteLinkCardPlugin />
      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
      {children}
    </RichEditor>
  )
}
```

### Key Plugin Mounting Pattern

1. **`SlashMenuPlugin`** (line 84): Rendered as an action within the `actions` prop — this is a component-based plugin that provides slash menu UI
2. **Other plugins** (lines 89-96): Mounted as direct children of `<RichEditor>` — these are Lexical command/event handlers that register without rendering UI
3. **Extra nodes** (lines 52-56): Merged defaults with optional custom nodes (TldrawEditNode, embed/linkcard/katex/gallery/codeSnippet edit nodes)
4. **Renderer config** (line 81): Uses `enhancedEditRendererConfig` from `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` for full editing UI support

**The distinction**: `SlashMenuPlugin` is a UI component, while `BlockHandlePlugin`, `FloatingToolbarPlugin`, etc., are command/event handlers that register with the Lexical editor internally.

```text
     1→import { $createMentionNode } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     3→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     4→import {
     5→  LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin,
     6→  useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch,
     7→} from '@lexical/react/LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin'
     8→import type { TextNode } from 'lexical'
     9→import {
    10→  $createTextNode,
    11→  $getSelection,
    12→  $insertNodes,
    13→  $isRangeSelection,
    14→} from 'lexical'
    15→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    16→import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    17→
    18→import { MentionMenuItem } from './MentionMenuItem'
    19→import { MentionMenuList } from './MentionMenuList'
    20→import type { MentionPlatformDef } from './MentionPlatformRegistry'
    21→import { getAllPlatforms } from './MentionPlatformRegistry'
    22→
    23→export interface MentionMenuPluginProps {
    24→  extraPlatforms?: MentionPlatformDef[]
    25→}
    26→
    27→function parseQueryPhase(
    28→  query: string,
    29→  platforms: MentionPlatformDef[],
    30→): { phase: 1 | 2; options: MentionMenuItem[] } {
    31→  const colonIdx = query.indexOf(':')
    32→
    33→  if (colonIdx !== -1) {
    34→    const platformKey = query.slice(0, colonIdx).toUpperCase()
    35→    const handle = query.slice(colonIdx + 1)
    36→    const platform = platforms.find((p) => p.key === platformKey)
    37→
    38→    if (platform) {
    39→      const confirmItem = new MentionMenuItem({
    40→        type: 'confirm',
    41→        platformKey,
    42→        icon: platform.icon,
    43→        label: handle ? `@${handle}` : 'Type username...',
    44→        description: `${platform.label} — Enter to confirm`,
    45→        handleText: handle,
    46→      })
    47→      return { phase: 2, options: [confirmItem] }
    48→    }
    49→  }
    50→
    51→  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
    52→  const filtered = platforms
    53→    .filter(
    54→      (p) =>
    55→        !query ||
    56→        p.key.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
    57→        p.label.toLowerCase().includes(lower),
    58→    )
    59→    .map(
    60→      (p) =>
    61→        new MentionMenuItem({
    62→          type: 'platform',
    63→          platformKey: p.key,
    64→          icon: p.icon,
    65→          label: p.label,
    66→          description: `@${p.key}:username`,
    67→        }),
    68→    )
    69→  return { phase: 1, options: filtered }
    70→}
    71→
    72→export function MentionMenuPlugin({
    73→  extraPlatforms,
    74→}: MentionMenuPluginProps = {}) {
    75→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    76→  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)
    77→
    78→  const platforms = useMemo(
    79→    () => getAllPlatforms(extraPlatforms),
    80→    [extraPlatforms],
    81→  )
    82→
    83→  const { phase, options } = useMemo(
    84→    () => parseQueryPhase(queryString ?? '', platforms),
    85→    [queryString, platforms],
    86→  )
    87→
    88→  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch('@', {
    89→    minLength: 0,
    90→  })
    91→
    92→  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    93→    (
    94→      option: MentionMenuItem,
    95→      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
    96→      closeMenu: () => void,
    97→    ) => {
    98→      if (option.type === 'platform') {
    99→        editor.update(() => {
   100→          if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
   101→            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
   102→          }
   103→          const selection = $getSelection()
   104→          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   105→            selection.insertText(`@${option.platformKey}:`)
   106→          }
   107→        })
   108→      } else {
   109→        const handle = option.handleText.trim()
   110→        if (!handle) return
   111→
   112→        editor.update(() => {
   113→          if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
   114→            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
   115→          }
   116→          const mentionNode = $createMentionNode(option.platformKey, handle)
   117→          const spaceNode = $createTextNode(' ')
   118→          $insertNodes([mentionNode, spaceNode])
   119→          spaceNode.select()
   120→        })
   121→        closeMenu()
   122→      }
   123→    },
   124→    [editor],
   125→  )
   126→
   127→  return (
   128→    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<MentionMenuItem>
   129→      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
   130→      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
   131→      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
   132→      options={options}
   133→      menuRenderFn={(
   134→        anchorElementRef,
   135→        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
   136→      ) => {
   137→        if (!anchorElementRef.current) return null
   138→        if (phase === 1 && options.length === 0) return null
   139→
   140→        return createPortal(
   141→          <PortalThemeWrapper>
   142→            <MentionMenuList
   143→              options={options}
   144→              selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
   145→              selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
   146→              setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
   147→              phase={phase}
   148→            />
   149→          </PortalThemeWrapper>,
   150→          anchorElementRef.current,
   151→        )
   152→      }}
   153→    />
   154→  )
   155→}
   156→
```
</details></tool-use>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I can see the complete picture. Let me analyze the key issue.

### The trigger function regex problem

Looking at `useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch`:
```javascript
const PUNCTUATION = '\\.,\\+\\*\\?\\$\\@\\|#{}\\(\\)\\^\\-\\[\\]\\\\/!%\'"~=<>_:;';

function useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(trigger, {
  minLength = 1,
  maxLength = 75,
  punctuation = PUNCTUATION,
  allowWhitespace = false


}) {
  return useCallback(text => {
    const validCharsSuffix = allowWhitespace ? '' : '\\s';
    const validChars = '[^' + trigger + punctuation + validCharsSuffix + ']';
    const TypeaheadTriggerRegex = new RegExp('(^|\\s|\\()(' + '[' + trigger + ']' + '((?:' + validChars + '){0,' + maxLength + '})' + ')$');
    const match = TypeaheadTriggerRegex.exec(text);
    ...
  }, [...]);
}
```

Building the regex pattern...

I see the issue now—the `validChars` pattern excludes colons because they're in the punctuation list, so when the text becomes `@TG:`, the regex fails to match since `:` isn't considered a valid character. That's why the typeahead menu closes when it shouldn't. I need to modify the punctuation configuration to allow colons in usernames. I need to reconsider the punctuation approach—the `@` symbol is already in the default punctuation set, which would break the trigger matching. Since removing `:` from the punctuation string still leaves `@` as a punctuation character, that won't work for our use case. A custom trigger function is the better path forward, one that specifically matches `@` followed by non-whitespace characters including colons. I realize a simpler approach would be to customize the `punctuation` parameter in `useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch` to exclude the colon character, allowing it to be part of the mention query. I need to take the default punctuation string from Lexical and remove the `:` from it.

Defining the custom punctuation constant...

Now I see the real problem—the colon needs to be allowed in the query string so `@TG:innei` properly captures `TG:innei` as the search term. For the second part, I should improve the Phase 2 UI to display the selected platform as a chip or tag, with a clear input prompt for the username and a preview of what the user is typing.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 17:05:33Z)**_

找到根因了。看 Lexical 源码 line 455 和 542：

```js
const PUNCTUATION = '\\.,\\+\\*\\?\\$\\@\\|#{}\\(\\)\\^\\-\\[\\]\\\\/!%\'"~=<>_:;';
const validChars = '[^' + trigger + punctuation + validCharsSuffix + ']';
```

**`:` 在 `PUNCTUATION` 中，被排除在 validChars 之外**。`useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch('@')` 匹配 `@TG` 但无法匹配 `@TG:innei`，因为 `:` 是标点。Phase 2 根本不会触发。

需自定义 punctuation 去掉 `:`，同时改进 Phase 2 UI。

<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import { $createMentionNode } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import {
  LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin,
  useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch,
} from '@lexical/react/LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin'
import type { TextNode } from 'lexical'
import { $createTextNode } from 'lexical'
import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'

import { MentionMenuItem } from './MentionMenuItem'
import { MentionMenuList } from './MentionMenuList'
import type { MentionPlatformDef } from './MentionPlatformRegistry'
import { getAllPlatforms } from './MentionPlatformRegistry'

export interface MentionMenuPluginProps {
  extraPlatforms?: MentionPlatformDef[]
}

// Default PUNCTUATION from Lexical excludes ':' which we need for the
// two-phase "@PLATFORM:handle" syntax.  We strip ':' from the set so the
// trigger regex keeps matching after the user selects a platform.
const MENTION_PUNCTUATION =
  '\\.,\\+\\*\\?\\$\\@\\|#{}\\(\\)\\^\\-\\[\\]\\\\/!%\'"~=<>_;'

function parseQueryPhase(
  query: string,
  platforms: MentionPlatformDef[],
): { phase: 1 | 2; options: MentionMenuItem[] } {
  const colonIdx = query.indexOf(':')

  if (colonIdx !== -1) {
    const platformKey = query.slice(0, colonIdx).toUpperCase()
    const handle = query.slice(colonIdx + 1)
    const platform = platforms.find((p) => p.key === platformKey)

    if (platform) {
      const confirmItem = new MentionMenuItem({
        type: 'confirm',
        platformKey,
        icon: platform.icon,
        label: handle ? `@${handle}` : 'Type username...',
        description: `${platform.label} — Enter to confirm`,
        handleText: handle,
      })
      return { phase: 2, options: [confirmItem] }
    }
  }

  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
  const filtered = platforms
    .filter(
      (p) =>
        !query ||
        p.key.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
        p.label.toLowerCase().includes(lower),
    )
    .map(
      (p) =>
        new MentionMenuItem({
          type: 'platform',
          platformKey: p.key,
          icon: p.icon,
          label: p.label,
          description: `@${p.key}:username`,
        }),
    )
  return { phase: 1, options: filtered }
}

export function MentionMenuPlugin({
  extraPlatforms,
}: MentionMenuPluginProps = {}) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)

  const platforms = useMemo(
    () => getAllPlatforms(extraPlatforms),
    [extraPlatforms],
  )

  const { phase, options } = useMemo(
    () => parseQueryPhase(queryString ?? '', platforms),
    [queryString, platforms],
  )

  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch('@', {
    minLength: 0,
    punctuation: MENTION_PUNCTUATION,
  })

  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    (
      option: MentionMenuItem,
      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
      closeMenu: () => void,
    ) => {
      if (option.type === 'platform') {
        // Phase 1: replace trigger text with @PLATFORM:, keep menu open
        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
          const text = `@${option.platformKey}:`
          const newTextNode = $createTextNode(text)
          textNodeContainingQuery.replace(newTextNode)
          newTextNode.select(text.length, text.length)
        }
        // Don't close — typeahead re-detects @PLATFORM: on next update
      } else {
        // Phase 2: insert MentionNode
        const handle = option.handleText.trim()
        if (!handle) return

        const mentionNode = $createMentionNode(option.platformKey, handle)
        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
          textNodeContainingQuery.replace(mentionNode)
        }
        const spaceNode = $createTextNode(' ')
        mentionNode.insertAfter(spaceNode)
        spaceNode.select(0, 0)
        closeMenu()
      }
    },
    [editor],
  )

  return (
    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<MentionMenuItem>
      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
      options={options}
      menuRenderFn={(
        anchorElementRef,
        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
      ) => {
        if (!anchorElementRef.current) return null
        if (phase === 1 && options.length === 0) return null

        return createPortal(
          <PortalThemeWrapper>
            <MentionMenuList
              options={options}
              selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
              selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
              setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
              phase={phase}
            />
          </PortalThemeWrapper>,
          anchorElementRef.current,
        )
      }}
    />
  )
}

```

```tsx
import type { MentionMenuItem } from './MentionMenuItem'
import * as css from './styles.css'

interface MentionMenuListProps {
  options: MentionMenuItem[]
  selectedIndex: number | null
  selectOptionAndCleanUp: (option: MentionMenuItem) => void
  setHighlightedIndex: (index: number) => void
  phase: 1 | 2
}

export function MentionMenuList({
  options,
  selectedIndex,
  selectOptionAndCleanUp,
  setHighlightedIndex,
  phase,
}: MentionMenuListProps) {
  if (phase === 2) {
    const item = options[0]
    if (!item) return null

    return (
      <div className={css.mentionMenu}>
        <div className={css.phase2Container}>
          <div className={css.platformTag}>
            <span className={css.platformTagIcon}>{item.icon}</span>
            {item.description.split(' — ')[0]}
          </div>
          {item.handleText ? (
            <ul
              style={{ listStyle: 'none', margin: 0, padding: 0 }}
              role="listbox"
            >
              <li
                className={css.mentionMenuItem}
                role="option"
                aria-selected={selectedIndex === 0}
                onClick={() => selectOptionAndCleanUp(item)}
                onMouseEnter={() => setHighlightedIndex(0)}
                ref={item.setRefElement}
                tabIndex={-1}
                style={{ margin: 0 }}
              >
                <span className={css.mentionMenuItemText}>
                  <span className={css.mentionMenuItemTitle}>
                    @{item.handleText}
                  </span>
                  <span className={css.mentionMenuItemDescription}>
                    Enter to confirm
                  </span>
                </span>
              </li>
            </ul>
          ) : (
            <div className={css.phase2Hint}>Type username, Enter to confirm</div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  if (options.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className={css.mentionMenu}>
        <div className={css.mentionMenuHint}>No matching platforms</div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <ul className={css.mentionMenu} role="listbox">
      {options.map((item, index) => (
        <li
          key={item.key}
          className={css.mentionMenuItem}
          role="option"
          aria-selected={index === selectedIndex}
          onClick={() => selectOptionAndCleanUp(item)}
          onMouseEnter={() => setHighlightedIndex(index)}
          ref={item.setRefElement}
          tabIndex={-1}
        >
          <span className={css.mentionMenuItemIcon}>{item.icon}</span>
          <span className={css.mentionMenuItemText}>
            <span className={css.mentionMenuItemTitle}>{item.label}</span>
            <span className={css.mentionMenuItemDescription}>
              {item.description}
            </span>
          </span>
        </li>
      ))}
    </ul>
  )
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-26 17:06:49Z)**_

全部构建通过。修复总结：

**根因**：Lexical 的 `useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch` 默认 `PUNCTUATION` 包含 `:`，导致 `validChars` 排除了 `:`。输入 `@TG:innei` 时 trigger regex 无法匹配 `:`，typeahead 直接 `closeTypeahead()` 关闭菜单，Phase 2 永远触发不了。

**修复**：
1. 自定义 `MENTION_PUNCTUATION`（去掉 `:`），传入 `useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch` 的 `punctuation` 参数
2. Phase 2 UI 改为 tag 形式——顶部显示平台标签（icon + 平台名），下方显示 handle 输入提示 + 确认操作

---

_**User (2026-02-26 17:09:10Z)**_

我们改一下 mention edit node 的 ux，不要点击就跳转到 link，应该是点击也是 trigger popover。
然后修改下 mention render，我们还是用 tag 形式的 UI 把

---

```text
     1→import { useRendererMode } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { Popover, PopoverPanel, PopoverTrigger } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     5→import { $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode } from 'lexical'
     6→import { AtSign, ExternalLink, Trash2, User } from 'lucide-react'
     7→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import type { MentionRendererProps } from './MentionRenderer'
    10→import {
    11→  MentionRenderer,
    12→  platformKeys,
    13→  platformMetaMap,
    14→} from './MentionRenderer'
    15→import * as styles from './styles.css'
    16→
    17→export function MentionEditRenderer(props: MentionRendererProps) {
    18→  const mode = useRendererMode()
    19→
    20→  if (mode !== 'editor') {
    21→    return <MentionRenderer {...props} />
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  return <MentionEditRendererInner {...props} />
    25→}
    26→
    27→function MentionEditRendererInner({
    28→  platform,
    29→  handle,
    30→  displayName,
    31→}: MentionRendererProps) {
    32→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    33→  const editable = editor.isEditable()
    34→  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement>(null)
    35→
    36→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
    37→  const [editPlatform, setEditPlatform] = useState(platform)
    38→  const [editHandle, setEditHandle] = useState(handle)
    39→  const [editDisplayName, setEditDisplayName] = useState(displayName || '')
    40→
    41→  useEffect(() => {
    42→    setEditPlatform(platform)
    43→    setEditHandle(handle)
    44→    setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
    45→  }, [platform, handle, displayName])
    46→
    47→  const commitChanges = useCallback(() => {
    48→    const trimmedHandle = editHandle.trim()
    49→    if (!trimmedHandle) return
    50→    if (!wrapperRef.current) return
    51→
    52→    editor.update(() => {
    53→      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
    54→      if (!node) return
    55→      const writable = node.getWritable() as unknown as Record<string, unknown>
    56→      writable.__platform = editPlatform
    57→      writable.__handle = trimmedHandle
    58→      writable.__displayName = editDisplayName.trim() || undefined
    59→    })
    60→    setOpen(false)
    61→  }, [editor, editPlatform, editHandle, editDisplayName])
    62→
    63→  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    64→    if (!wrapperRef.current) return
    65→
    66→    editor.update(() => {
    67→      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
    68→      if (node) node.remove()
    69→    })
    70→    setOpen(false)
    71→  }, [editor])
    72→
    73→  const handleOpen = useCallback(() => {
    74→    const normalizedHandle = handle.replace(/^@+/, '')
    75→    const meta = platformMetaMap[platform]
    76→    if (meta) {
    77→      window.open(
    78→        meta.getUrl(normalizedHandle),
    79→        '_blank',
    80→        'noopener,noreferrer',
    81→      )
    82→    }
    83→  }, [platform, handle])
    84→
    85→  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    86→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    87→      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
    88→        e.preventDefault()
    89→        commitChanges()
    90→      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    91→        e.preventDefault()
    92→        setEditPlatform(platform)
    93→        setEditHandle(handle)
    94→        setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
    95→        setOpen(false)
    96→      }
    97→    },
    98→    [commitChanges, platform, handle, displayName],
    99→  )
   100→
   101→  if (!editable) {
   102→    return (
   103→      <MentionRenderer
   104→        platform={platform}
   105→        handle={handle}
   106→        displayName={displayName}
   107→      />
   108→    )
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  return (
   112→    <Popover
   113→      open={open}
   114→      onOpenChange={(nextOpen: boolean) => {
   115→        setOpen(nextOpen)
   116→        if (!nextOpen) {
   117→          setEditPlatform(platform)
   118→          setEditHandle(handle)
   119→          setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
   120→        }
   121→      }}
   122→    >
   123→      <PopoverTrigger
   124→        delay={200}
   125→        closeDelay={300}
   126→        openOnHover
   127→        nativeButton={false}
   128→        render={
   129→          <span
   130→            ref={wrapperRef}
   131→            className={`${styles.editTrigger} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editTrigger}`}
   132→          />
   133→        }
   134→      >
   135→        <MentionRenderer
   136→          platform={platform}
   137→          handle={handle}
   138→          displayName={displayName}
   139→        />
   140→      </PopoverTrigger>
   141→      <PopoverPanel
   142→        side="bottom"
   143→        sideOffset={8}
   144→        className={`${styles.editPanel} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editPanel}`}
   145→      >
   146→        <div
   147→          className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   148→        >
   149→          <span
   150→            className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   151→            style={{ fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd }}
   152→            aria-hidden
   153→          >
   154→            {platformMetaMap[editPlatform]?.icon ?? <AtSign size={14} />}
   155→          </span>
   156→          <select
   157→            className={`${styles.editSelect} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editSelect}`}
   158→            value={editPlatform}
   159→            onChange={(e) => setEditPlatform(e.target.value)}
   160→          >
   161→            {platformKeys.map((key) => (
   162→              <option key={key} value={key}>
   163→                {platformMetaMap[key]!.label}
   164→              </option>
   165→            ))}
   166→          </select>
   167→        </div>
   168→        <div
   169→          className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   170→        >
   171→          <AtSign
   172→            className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   173→            size={14}
   174→          />
   175→          <input
   176→            className={`${styles.editInput} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editInput}`}
   177→            type="text"
   178→            value={editHandle}
   179→            onChange={(e) => setEditHandle(e.target.value)}
   180→            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   181→            placeholder="handle"
   182→          />
   183→        </div>
   184→        <div
   185→          className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   186→        >
   187→          <User
   188→            className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   189→            size={14}
   190→          />
   191→          <input
   192→            className={`${styles.editInput} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editInput}`}
   193→            type="text"
   194→            value={editDisplayName}
   195→            onChange={(e) => setEditDisplayName(e.target.value)}
   196→            onBlur={commitChanges}
   197→            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   198→            placeholder="Display name (optional)"
   199→          />
   200→        </div>
   201→        <div
   202→          className={`${styles.editActions} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActions}`}
   203→        >
   204→          <button
   205→            className={`${styles.editActionButton} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButton}`}
   206→            type="button"
   207→            onClick={handleOpen}
   208→          >
   209→            <ExternalLink size={14} />
   210→            Open
   211→          </button>
   212→          <button
   213→            className={`${styles.editActionButton} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButton} ${styles.editActionButtonEnd} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButtonEnd}`}
   214→            type="button"
   215→            onClick={handleDelete}
   216→          >
   217→            <Trash2 size={14} />
   218→            Remove
   219→          </button>
   220→        </div>
   221→      </PopoverPanel>
   222→    </Popover>
   223→  )
   224→}
```

```text
     7→
     8→import * as styles from './styles.css'
     9→
    10→export interface MentionRendererProps {
    11→  platform: string
    12→  handle: string
    13→  displayName?: string
    14→}
    15→
    16→interface MentionPlatformMeta {
    17→  label: string
    18→  icon: React.ReactNode
    19→  getUrl: (handle: string) => string
    20→}
    21→
    22→const GitHubIcon = (
    23→  <SiGithub
    24→    size="1em"
    25→    className={`${styles.mentionIconGitHub} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mentionIconGitHub}`}
    26→  />
    27→)
    28→const TwitterIcon = <SiX size="1em" color="#1DA1F2" />
    29→const TelegramIcon = <SiTelegram size="1em" color="#2AABEE" />
    30→const ZhihuIcon = <SiZhihu size="1em" color="#0084FF" />
    31→
    32→export const platformMetaMap: Record<string, MentionPlatformMeta> = {
    33→  GH: {
    34→    label: 'GitHub',
    35→    icon: GitHubIcon,
    36→    getUrl: (handle) => `https://github.com/${encodeURIComponent(handle)}`,
    37→  },

    42→  },
    43→  TG: {

    58→export function MentionRenderer({

    80→          href={meta.getUrl(normalizedHandle)}

    82→          rel="noopener noreferrer"
    83→        >

    85→        </a>

    89→

    94→      <span
    95→        className={`${styles.mentionHandle} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mentionHandle}`}
    96→      >
    97→        @{label}

    99→    </span>
   100→  )
   101→}
```

   - **LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin** internals: `selectOptionAndCleanUp` wraps `onSelectOption` in `editor.update()`, so no nested `editor.update()` needed; `$splitNodeContainingQuery` isolates trigger text
   - **useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch** — Uses `PUNCTUATION` constant including `:` which breaks two-phase `@PLATFORM:handle` syntax
   - **Vanilla Extract** CSS-in-TS — zero-runtime styling with `vars` design tokens from `@haklex/rich-style-token`
   - **Static/Edit split pattern** — Static renderers (no edit deps) vs Edit renderers (with Popover, lucide-react, etc.)
   - **Node.replace()** pattern vs `remove() + $insertNodes()` — `replace()` is more reliable for inline DecoratorNodes
   - **Shared Vite config** (`packages/vite.shared.ts`) — reads package.json deps to auto-externalize

3. Files and Code Sections:

     - Root cause fix: custom `MENTION_PUNCTUATION` without `:`
     - Uses `replace()` instead of `remove() + $insertNodes()` for reliable node insertion
     - `onSelectOption` runs inside `selectOptionAndCleanUp`'s `editor.update()`, no nesting needed
     ```typescript
     const MENTION_PUNCTUATION =
       '\\.,\\+\\*\\?\\$\\@\\|#{}\\(\\)\\^\\-\\[\\]\\\\/!%\'"~=<>_;'
     
     // Phase 1: platform selection
     if (option.type === 'platform') {
       if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
         const text = `@${option.platformKey}:`
         const newTextNode = $createTextNode(text)
         textNodeContainingQuery.replace(newTextNode)
         newTextNode.select(text.length, text.length)
       }
       // Don't close — typeahead re-detects @PLATFORM: on next update
     } else {
       // Phase 2: insert MentionNode
       const handle = option.handleText.trim()
       if (!handle) return
       const mentionNode = $createMentionNode(option.platformKey, handle)
       if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
         textNodeContainingQuery.replace(mentionNode)
       }
       const spaceNode = $createTextNode(' ')
       mentionNode.insertAfter(spaceNode)
       spaceNode.select(0, 0)
       closeMenu()
     }
     ```

   - **`packages/rich-plugin-mention/src/MentionPlatformRegistry.ts`** (CREATED)
     - Imports `platformMetaMap` from `@haklex/rich-renderer-mention`
     - Dedup + uppercase normalization in `getAllPlatforms`
     ```typescript
     export function getAllPlatforms(extra?: MentionPlatformDef[]): MentionPlatformDef[] {
       if (!extra) return builtinPlatforms
       const map = new Map<string, MentionPlatformDef>()
       for (const p of builtinPlatforms) map.set(p.key.toUpperCase(), p)
       for (const p of extra) map.set(p.key.toUpperCase(), { ...p, key: p.key.toUpperCase() })
       return [...map.values()]
     }
     ```

   - **`packages/rich-plugin-mention/src/MentionMenuItem.ts`** (CREATED)

```text
    51→    getUrl: (handle) =>
    52→      `https://www.zhihu.com/people/${encodeURIComponent(handle)}`,
    53→  },
    54→}
    55→
    56→export const platformKeys = Object.keys(platformMetaMap)
    57→
    58→export function MentionRenderer({
    59→  platform,
    60→  handle,
    61→  displayName,
    62→}: MentionRendererProps) {
    63→  const normalizedHandle = handle.replace(/^@+/, '')
    64→  const meta = platformMetaMap[platform]
    65→  const label = displayName || normalizedHandle
    66→
    67→  if (meta) {
    68→    return (
    69→      <span
    70→        className={`${styles.mention} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mention}`}
    71→      >
    72→        <span
    73→          className={`${styles.mentionIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mentionIcon}`}
    74→          aria-hidden
    75→        >
    76→          {meta.icon}
    77→        </span>
    78→        <a
    79→          className={`${styles.mentionHandle} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mentionHandle}`}
    80→          href={meta.getUrl(normalizedHandle)}
    81→          target="_blank"
    82→          rel="noopener noreferrer"
    83→        >
    84→          {label}
    85→        </a>
    86→      </span>
    87→    )
    88→  }
    89→
    90→  return (
    91→    <span
    92→      className={`${styles.mention} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mention} ${styles.mentionPlain} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mentionPlain}`}
    93→    >
    94→      <span
    95→        className={`${styles.mentionHandle} ${styles.semanticClassNames.mentionHandle}`}
    96→      >
    97→        @{label}
    98→      </span>
    99→    </span>
   100→  )
   101→}
   102→
```

```text
     5→import { $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode } from 'lexical'

     7→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import type { MentionRendererProps } from './MentionRenderer'
    10→import {
    11→  MentionRenderer,
    12→  platformKeys,
    13→  platformMetaMap,
    14→} from './MentionRenderer'
    15→import * as styles from './styles.css'
    16→
    17→export function MentionEditRenderer(props: MentionRendererProps) {
    18→  const mode = useRendererMode()
    19→
    20→  if (mode !== 'editor') {
    21→    return <MentionRenderer {...props} />
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  return <MentionEditRendererInner {...props} />
    25→}
    26→
    27→function MentionEditRendererInner({
    28→  platform,
    29→  handle,
    30→  displayName,
    31→}: MentionRendererProps) {
    32→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    33→  const editable = editor.isEditable()
    34→  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement>(null)
    35→
    36→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
    37→  const [editPlatform, setEditPlatform] = useState(platform)
    38→  const [editHandle, setEditHandle] = useState(handle)
    39→  const [editDisplayName, setEditDisplayName] = useState(displayName || '')
    40→
    41→  useEffect(() => {
    42→    setEditPlatform(platform)
    43→    setEditHandle(handle)
    44→    setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
    45→  }, [platform, handle, displayName])
    46→
    47→  const commitChanges = useCallback(() => {
    48→    const trimmedHandle = editHandle.trim()
    49→    if (!trimmedHandle) return
    50→    if (!wrapperRef.current) return
    51→
    52→    editor.update(() => {
    53→      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
    54→      if (!node) return
    55→      const writable = node.getWritable() as unknown as Record<string, unknown>
    56→      writable.__platform = editPlatform
    57→      writable.__handle = trimmedHandle
    58→      writable.__displayName = editDisplayName.trim() || undefined
    59→    })
    60→    setOpen(false)
    61→  }, [editor, editPlatform, editHandle, editDisplayName])
    62→
    63→  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    64→    if (!wrapperRef.current) return
    65→
    66→    editor.update(() => {
    67→      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
    68→      if (node) node.remove()
    69→    })
    70→    setOpen(false)
    71→  }, [editor])
    72→
    73→  const handleOpen = useCallback(() => {
    74→    const normalizedHandle = handle.replace(/^@+/, '')
    75→    const meta = platformMetaMap[platform]
    76→    if (meta) {
    77→      window.open(
    78→        meta.getUrl(normalizedHandle),
    79→        '_blank',
    80→        'noopener,noreferrer',
    81→      )
    82→    }
    83→  }, [platform, handle])
    84→
    85→  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    86→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    87→      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
    88→        e.preventDefault()
    89→        commitChanges()
    90→      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    91→        e.preventDefault()
    92→        setEditPlatform(platform)
    93→        setEditHandle(handle)
    94→        setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
    95→        setOpen(false)
    96→      }
    97→    },
    98→    [commitChanges, platform, handle, displayName],
    99→  )
   100→
   101→  if (!editable) {
   102→    return (
   103→      <MentionRenderer
   104→        platform={platform}
   105→        handle={handle}
   106→        displayName={displayName}
   107→      />
   108→    )
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  return (
   112→    <Popover
   113→      open={open}
   114→      onOpenChange={(nextOpen: boolean) => {
   115→        setOpen(nextOpen)
   116→        if (!nextOpen) {
   117→          setEditPlatform(platform)
   118→          setEditHandle(handle)
   119→          setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
   120→        }
   121→      }}
   122→    >
   123→      <PopoverTrigger
   124→        delay={200}
   125→        closeDelay={300}
   126→        openOnHover
   127→        nativeButton={false}
   128→        render={
   129→          <span
   130→            ref={wrapperRef}
   131→            className={`${styles.editTrigger} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editTrigger}`}
   132→          />
   133→        }
   134→      >
   135→        <MentionRenderer
   136→          platform={platform}
   137→          handle={handle}
   138→          displayName={displayName}
   139→        />
   140→      </PopoverTrigger>
   141→      <PopoverPanel
   142→        side="bottom"
   143→        sideOffset={8}
   144→        className={`${styles.editPanel} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editPanel}`}
   145→      >
   146→        <div
   147→          className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   148→        >
   149→          <span
   150→            className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   151→            style={{ fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd }}
   152→            aria-hidden
   153→          >
   154→            {platformMetaMap[editPlatform]?.icon ?? <AtSign size={14} />}
   155→          </span>
   156→          <select
   157→            className={`${styles.editSelect} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editSelect}`}
   158→            value={editPlatform}
   159→            onChange={(e) => setEditPlatform(e.target.value)}
   160→          >
   161→            {platformKeys.map((key) => (
   162→              <option key={key} value={key}>
   163→                {platformMetaMap[key]!.label}
   164→              </option>
   165→            ))}
   166→          </select>
   167→        </div>
   168→        <div
   169→          className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   170→        >
   171→          <AtSign
   172→            className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   173→            size={14}
   174→          />
   175→          <input
   176→            className={`${styles.editInput} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editInput}`}
   177→            type="text"
   178→            value={editHandle}
   179→            onChange={(e) => setEditHandle(e.target.value)}
   180→            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   181→            placeholder="handle"
   182→          />
   183→        </div>
   184→        <div
   185→          className={`${styles.editField} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editField}`}
   186→        >
   187→          <User
   188→            className={`${styles.editFieldIcon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editFieldIcon}`}
   189→            size={14}
   190→          />
   191→          <input
   192→            className={`${styles.editInput} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editInput}`}
   193→            type="text"
   194→            value={editDisplayName}
   195→            onChange={(e) => setEditDisplayName(e.target.value)}
   196→            onBlur={commitChanges}
   197→            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   198→            placeholder="Display name (optional)"
   199→          />
   200→        </div>
   201→        <div
   202→          className={`${styles.editActions} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActions}`}
   203→        >

   210→            Open
   211→          </button>
   212→          <button
   213→            className={`${styles.editActionButton} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButton} ${styles.editActionButtonEnd} ${styles.semanticClassNames.editActionButtonEnd}`}
   214→            type="button"
   215→            onClick={handleDelete}
   216→          >
   217→            <Trash2 size={14} />
   218→            Remove
   219→          </button>

   221→      </PopoverPanel>
   222→    </Popover>
```

```text
    33→  ...galleryEditNodes,
    34→  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
    35→]
    36→
    37→export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<

    40→> {

    45→
    46→export function ShiroEditor({

    51→  ...props
    52→}: ShiroEditorProps) {

    56→    [extraNodes],

    99→      {children}
   100→    </RichEditor>

   102→}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-plugin-mention/src/MentionPlatformRegistry.ts`

```text
     1→import { platformMetaMap } from '@haklex/rich-renderer-mention'
     2→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface MentionPlatformDef {
     5→  key: string
     6→  label: string
     7→  icon: ReactNode
     8→  getUrl: (handle: string) => string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export const builtinPlatforms: MentionPlatformDef[] = Object.entries(
    12→  platformMetaMap,
    13→).map(([key, meta]) => ({
    14→  key,
    15→  label: meta.label,
    16→  icon: meta.icon,
    17→  getUrl: meta.getUrl,
    18→}))
    19→
    20→export function getAllPlatforms(
    21→  extra?: MentionPlatformDef[],
    22→): MentionPlatformDef[] {
    23→  if (!extra) return builtinPlatforms
    24→  const map = new Map<string, MentionPlatformDef>()
    25→  for (const p of builtinPlatforms) map.set(p.key.toUpperCase(), p)
    26→  for (const p of extra) map.set(p.key.toUpperCase(), { ...p, key: p.key.toUpperCase() })
    27→  return [...map.values()]
    28→}
    29→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     7→import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     8→import { DialogStackProvider } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     9→import { TldrawConfigProvider } from '@haklex/rich-renderers/tldraw'
    10→import { Monitor, Moon, Sun } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { ThemeContext } from './context/ThemeContext'
    14→import { DiffPage } from './pages/DiffPage'
    15→import { EditorPage } from './pages/EditorPage'
    16→import { NodeShowcase } from './pages/NodeShowcase'
    17→import { PresetsPage } from './pages/PresetsPage'
    18→
    19→type Page = 'editor' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'diff'
    20→type ThemeMode = 'system' | 'light' | 'dark'
    21→
    22→function useSystemColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    23→  const [scheme, setScheme] = useState<ColorScheme>(() =>
    24→    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches
    25→      ? 'dark'
    26→      : 'light',
    27→  )
    28→
    29→  useEffect(() => {
    30→    const mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    31→    const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) =>
    32→      setScheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
    33→    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    34→    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    35→  }, [])
    36→
    37→  return scheme
    38→}
    39→
    40→export function App() {
    41→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    42→    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    43→    return hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    44→      ? hash
    45→      : 'editor'
    46→  })
    47→  const [themeMode, setThemeMode] = useState<ThemeMode>('system')
    48→  const systemScheme = useSystemColorScheme()
    49→
    50→  const resolved: ColorScheme =
    51→    themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode
    52→
    53→  const dataTheme = useMemo(
    54→    () => (themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode),
    55→    [systemScheme, themeMode],
    56→  )
    57→
    58→  const cycleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    59→    setThemeMode((m) => {
    60→      if (m === 'system') return 'light'
    61→      if (m === 'light') return 'dark'
    62→      return 'system'
    63→    })
    64→  }, [])
    65→
    66→  const themeLabel =
    67→    themeMode === 'system' ? 'System' : themeMode === 'light' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'
    68→  const ThemeIcon =
    69→    themeMode === 'system' ? Monitor : themeMode === 'light' ? Sun : Moon
    70→
    71→  useEffect(() => {
    72→    const handleHashChange = () => {
    73→      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    74→      const validPage =
    75→        hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    76→          ? hash
    77→          : 'editor'
    78→      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    82→    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    83→  }, [])
    84→
    85→  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    86→    window.location.hash = page
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  const mockSaveSnapshot = useCallback(async (snapshot: object) => {
    90→    const json = JSON.stringify(snapshot)
    91→    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' })
    92→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
    93→    console.log('[TldrawConfig] saveSnapshot → blob URL:', url)
    94→    return url
    95→  }, [])
    96→
    97→  return (
    98→    <ThemeContext value={resolved}>
    99→      <TldrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
   100→        <DialogStackProvider>
   101→          <div className="app" data-theme={dataTheme}>
   102→            <header className="app-header">
   103→              <div className="app-header-content">
   104→                <div>
   105→                  <h1 className="app-title">@haklex/rich-editor</h1>
   106→                  <p className="app-subtitle">
   107→                    Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
   108→                  </p>
   109→                </div>
   110→                <nav className="app-nav">
   111→                  <button
   112→                    className={
   113→                      currentPage === 'editor'
   114→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   115→                        : 'nav-tab'
   116→                    }
   117→                    onClick={() => navigate('editor')}
   118→                  >
   119→                    Editor
   120→                  </button>
   121→                  <button
   122→                    className={
   123→                      currentPage === 'nodes'
   124→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   125→                        : 'nav-tab'
   126→                    }
   127→                    onClick={() => navigate('nodes')}
   128→                  >
   129→                    Node Showcase
   130→                  </button>
   131→                  <button
   132→                    className={
   133→                      currentPage === 'presets'
   134→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   135→                        : 'nav-tab'
   136→                    }
   137→                    onClick={() => navigate('presets')}
   138→                  >
   139→                    Presets
   140→                  </button>
   141→                  <button
   142→                    className={
   143→                      currentPage === 'diff'
   144→                        ? 'nav-tab nav-tab-active'
   145→                        : 'nav-tab'
   146→                    }
   147→                    onClick={() => navigate('diff')}
   148→                  >
   149→                    Diff
   150→                  </button>
   151→                  <div className="nav-divider" />
   152→                  <button
   153→                    className="nav-theme-toggle"
   154→                    onClick={cycleTheme}
   155→                    title={themeLabel}
   156→                  >
   157→                    <ThemeIcon size={18} />
   158→                  </button>
   159→                </nav>
   160→              </div>
   161→            </header>
   162→
   163→            <main className="app-main">
   164→              {currentPage === 'editor' && <EditorPage />}
   165→              {currentPage === 'nodes' && <NodeShowcase />}
   166→              {currentPage === 'presets' && <PresetsPage />}
   167→              {currentPage === 'diff' && <DiffPage />}
   168→            </main>
   169→          </div>
   170→        </DialogStackProvider>
   171→      </TldrawConfigProvider>
   172→    </ThemeContext>
   173→  )
   174→}
```

```text
    55→              <button
    56→                className={mode === 'edit' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    57→                onClick={() => setMode('edit')}
    58→              >
    59→                Edit
    60→              </button>
    61→              <button
    62→                className={mode === 'readonly' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    63→                onClick={() => setMode('readonly')}
    64→              >
    65→                Readonly
    66→              </button>
    67→            </div>
    68→            <div className="toolbar-group">
    69→              <span className="toolbar-label">Variant</span>
    70→              <button
    71→                className={variant === 'article' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    72→                onClick={() => setVariant('article')}
    73→              >
    74→                Article
    75→              </button>
    76→              <button
    77→                className={variant === 'comment' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    78→                onClick={() => setVariant('comment')}
    79→              >
    80→                Comment
    81→              </button>
    82→              <button
    83→                className={variant === 'note' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    84→                onClick={() => setVariant('note')}
    85→              >
    86→                Note
    87→              </button>
    88→            </div>
    89→          </div>
    90→
    91→          {/* Renderer */}
    92→          <Panel title={selected.label} badge={`${variant} · ${mode}`}>
    93→            {mode === 'edit' ? (
    94→              <ShiroEditor
    95→                key={`${selected.key}-edit`}
    96→                initialValue={selected.data}
    97→                variant={variant}
    98→                theme={theme}
    99→                onChange={setLiveState}
   100→              />
   101→            ) : (
   102→              <ShiroRenderer
   103→                key={`${selected.key}-readonly`}
   104→                value={selected.data}
   105→                variant={variant}
   106→                theme={theme}
   107→              />
   108→            )}
   109→          </Panel>
   110→
   111→          {/* JSON */}
   112→          <Panel title="Serialized JSON">
   113→            <JsonViewer data={jsonData} defaultExpanded={false} />
   114→          </Panel>
   115→        </div>
   116→      </div>
   117→    </div>
   118→  )
   119→}
   120→
```

```text
   130→          >
   131→            Note
   132→          </button>
   133→        </div>
   134→
   135→        <div className="toolbar-group">
   136→          <span className="toolbar-label">Colors</span>
   137→          {colorOverridePresets.map((preset) => {
   138→            const colors = theme === 'dark' ? preset.dark : preset.light
   139→            return (
   140→              <button
   141→                key={preset.label}
   142→                className={
   143→                  !customAccent && selectedPreset === preset.label
   144→                    ? 'btn btn-active'
   145→                    : 'btn'
   146→                }
   147→                onClick={() => {
   148→                  setSelectedPreset(preset.label)
   149→                  setCustomAccent('')
   150→                }}
   151→              >
   152→                {colors.accent && (
   153→                  <span
   154→                    style={{
   155→                      display: 'inline-block',
   156→                      width: 10,
   157→                      height: 10,
   158→                      borderRadius: '50%',
   159→                      backgroundColor: colors.accent,
   160→                      marginRight: 4,
   161→                      verticalAlign: 'middle',
   162→                    }}
   163→                  />
   164→                )}
   165→                {preset.label}
   166→              </button>
   167→            )
   168→          })}
   169→          <label
   170→            className={customAccent ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   171→            style={{ display: 'inline-flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 4 }}
   172→          >
   173→            Custom
   174→            <input
   175→              type="color"
   176→              value={customAccent || '#33a6b8'}
   177→              onChange={(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) =>
   178→                setCustomAccent(e.target.value)
   179→              }
   180→              style={{ width: 20, height: 20, border: 'none', padding: 0 }}
   181→            />
   182→          </label>
   183→        </div>
   184→
   185→        <div className="toolbar-group">
   186→          <span className="toolbar-label">View</span>
   187→          <button
   188→            className={showRenderer ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   189→            onClick={() => setShowRenderer((v) => !v)}
   190→          >
   191→            Renderer
   192→          </button>
   193→          <button
   194→            className={showJson ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   195→            onClick={() => setShowJson((v) => !v)}
   196→          >
   197→            JSON
   198→          </button>
   199→          <button
   200→            className={showImport ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   201→            onClick={() => setShowImport((v) => !v)}
   202→          >
   203→            Import
   204→          </button>
   205→        </div>
   206→      </div>
   207→
   208→      {/* Editor panel */}
   209→      <Panel title="Editor" badge={variant}>
   210→        <ShiroEditor
   211→          initialValue={initialContent}
   212→          onChange={handleChange}
   213→          variant={variant}
   214→          theme={theme}
   215→          style={themeOverrideStyle}
   216→          placeholder="Start typing... Try markdown shortcuts like # heading, **bold**, *italic*, > quote, ||spoiler||"
   217→          onSubmit={() => console.info('[Submit] Cmd/Ctrl+Enter pressed')}
   218→          autoFocus
   219→          onEditorReady={handleEditorReady}
   220→        />
   221→      </Panel>
   222→
   223→      {/* Renderer panel */}
   224→      {showRenderer && editorState && (
   225→        <Panel title="Renderer (readonly)" badge={variant}>
   226→          <ShiroRenderer
   227→            value={editorState}
   228→            variant={variant}
   229→            theme={theme}
   230→            style={themeOverrideStyle}
   231→          />
   232→        </Panel>
   233→      )}
   234→
   235→      {/* JSON panel */}
   236→      {showJson && editorState && (
   237→        <Panel
   238→          title="Serialized JSON (EditorState)"
   239→          headerExtra={
   240→            <button
   241→              className="btn btn-sm"
   242→              onClick={() => {
   243→                navigator.clipboard.writeText(
   244→                  JSON.stringify(editorState, null, 2),
   245→                )
   246→              }}
   247→            >
   248→              Copy
   249→            </button>
   250→          }
   251→        >
   252→          <pre className="json-pre">{JSON.stringify(editorState, null, 2)}</pre>
   253→        </Panel>
   254→      )}
   255→
   256→      {/* Import panel */}
   257→      {showImport && (
   258→        <Panel title="Import JSON">
   259→          <textarea
   260→            className="import-textarea"
   261→            value={importJson}
   262→            onChange={(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) =>
   263→              setImportJson(e.target.value)
   264→            }
   265→            placeholder="Paste serialized EditorState JSON here..."
   266→            rows={8}
   267→          />
   268→          <div style={{ marginTop: '8px', display: 'flex', gap: '8px' }}>
   269→            <button className="btn btn-active" onClick={handleImport}>
   270→              Load
   271→            </button>
   272→            <button
   273→              className="btn"
   274→              onClick={() => {
   275→                setShowImport(false)
   276→                setImportJson('')
   277→              }}
   278→            >
   279→              Cancel
   280→            </button>
   281→          </div>
   282→        </Panel>
   283→      )}
   284→
   285→      {/* Tips */}
   286→      <div className="tips">
   287→        <h3 className="tips-title">Markdown Shortcuts</h3>
   288→        <div className="tips-grid">
   289→          <code># Heading 1</code>
   290→          <code>## Heading 2</code>
   291→          <code>**bold**</code>
   292→          <code>*italic*</code>
   293→          <code>++underline++</code>
   294→          <code>~~strikethrough~~</code>
   295→          <code>`inline code`</code>
   296→          <code>&gt; blockquote</code>
   297→          <code>&gt; [!NOTE]</code>
   298→          <code>- list item</code>
   299→          <code>- [ ] task</code>
   300→          <code>- [x] done</code>
   301→          <code>1. ordered list</code>
   302→          <code>---</code>
   303→          <code>||spoiler||</code>
   304→          <code>[^1] footnote</code>
   305→          <code>{'$E=mc^2$'}</code>
   306→          <code>{'$$\\int f(x)dx$$'}</code>
   307→          <code>{'{GH@username}'}</code>
   308→          <code>::: warning</code>
   309→          <code>/ slash commands</code>
   310→        </div>
   311→      </div>
   312→    </div>
   313→  )
   314→}
   315→
```

Now I need to add the extra mention platform presets to the EditorPage. I'll create a set of preset platforms (Discord, YouTube, Bilibili, Reddit, Mastodon) with toggle buttons. Actually, an important consideration: since `ShiroEditor` creates the `MentionMenuPlugin` internally, changing `extraMentionPlatforms` doesn't require remounting the editor - the plugin will re-render with new platforms via `useMemo` inside `MentionMenuPlugin`. Good.


I'll define the preset platforms with simple text-based icons since the icon prop accepts any ReactNode, so I don't need to worry about finding the perfect lucide icons.

For these demo presets, emoji icons work fine since they're serving a practical purpose. I could switch to a proper icon library like `@icons-pack/react-simple-icons`, but the demo setup doesn't currently have that dependency available.

Lucide-react used to have platform-specific social icons but those were removed, so I'd need to map generic icons like `MessageCircle` for Discord or `Play` for YouTube, which feels less intuitive. Simple styled letter badges or colored spans would be cleaner and require no additional dependencies—that's probably the best approach for a demo. I'm going to stick with the simple span approach for the demo presets since the main renderer already uses proper icon libraries. Now I need to add the UI for toggling extra platforms—a list of preset options with checkboxes in the toolbar, then pass the active selections to the ShiroEditor component.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Wait, I added a `key` prop that changes when platforms change. This will remount the editor when toggling platforms, which will lose content. That's not ideal. Actually, since `MentionMenuPlugin` gets `extraPlatforms` as a prop and uses `useMemo`, it should update reactively without needing to remount. Let me remove the key.

Actually, wait - looking at the code again:

```tsx
const platforms = useMemo(
  () => getAllPlatforms(extraPlatforms),
  [extraPlatforms],
)
```

The issue is that `extraPlatforms` is an array, and if we create a new array each time, `useMemo` will re-run because array reference changes. But the `activePlatforms` is already memoized. And `ShiroEditor` passes it to `MentionMenuPlugin` which uses `useMemo` on `extraPlatforms`. Since `activePlatforms` is a new array each time `enabledPlatforms` changes, the `useMemo` in `MentionMenuPlugin` will correctly re-compute.

So I can remove the `key` prop. Remounting the editor just to change mention platforms is bad UX since it loses content.
</details></think>

```text
   208→      {
   209→        type: 'code-block',
   210→        language: 'typescript',
   211→        code: `interface FeedItem {
   212→  id: string
   213→  title: string
   214→  createdAt: string
   215→  tags: string[]
   216→}
   217→
   218→type FeedResponse = {
   219→  data: FeedItem[]
   220→  nextCursor?: string
   221→}
   222→
   223→async function fetchFeed(cursor?: string): Promise<FeedResponse> {
   224→  const url = new URL('/api/feed', location.origin)
   225→  if (cursor) {
   226→    url.searchParams.set('cursor', cursor)
   227→  }
   228→
   229→  const response = await fetch(url.toString())
   230→  if (!response.ok) {
   231→    throw new Error(\`Feed request failed: \${response.status}\`)
   232→  }
   233→
   234→  return (await response.json()) as FeedResponse
   235→}
   236→
   237→async function bootstrapFeed() {
   238→  const firstPage = await fetchFeed()
   239→  console.log('Loaded items:', firstPage.data.length)
   240→}`,
   241→        version: 1,
   242→      } as any,

   750→        type: 'code-block',
   751→        language: 'typescript',
   752→        code: `// app/posts/page.tsx
   753→export default async function PostsPage() {
   754→  // This runs on the server only!
   755→  const posts = await db.posts.findMany({
   756→    orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
   757→    take: 10,
   758→  })
   759→
   760→  return (
   761→    <div>
   762→      {posts.map((post) => (
   763→        <PostCard key={post.id} post={post} />
   764→      ))}
   765→    </div>
   766→  )
   767→}`,
   768→        version: 1,
   769→      } as any,

   777→          text('useEffect', FORMAT_CODE),
   778→          text('. Mark client components with '),
   779→          text('"use client"', FORMAT_CODE),

   789→        text(". Here's a comparison of popular solutions:"),

   792→      {
   793→        type: 'details',

   802→                text(' - Minimal boilerplate, great DX, 1.2KB gzipped'),
   803→              ),
   804→            ),
```

```text
     3→// Re-export common node types (defined inline to avoid Lexical package import issues)
     4→type SerializedTextNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
     5→  type: 'text'
     6→  text: string
     7→  format: number
     8→  detail: number

    12→
    13→type SerializedParagraphNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    14→  type: 'paragraph'
    15→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    16→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    17→  format: string
    18→  indent: number
    19→  textFormat: number
    20→  textStyle: string
    21→}
    22→
    23→type SerializedHeadingNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    24→  type: 'heading'
    25→  tag: 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    26→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    27→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    28→  format: string
    29→  indent: number
    30→}
    31→
    32→type SerializedQuoteNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    33→  type: 'quote'
    34→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    35→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    36→  format: string
    37→  indent: number
    38→}
    39→
    40→type SerializedListNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    41→  type: 'list'
    42→  listType: 'bullet' | 'number'
    43→  start: number
    44→  tag: 'ul' | 'ol'
    45→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    46→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    47→  format: string
    48→  indent: number
    49→}
    50→
    51→type SerializedListItemNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    52→  type: 'listitem'
    53→  value: number
    54→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    55→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    56→  format: string
    57→  indent: number
    58→}
    59→
    60→type SerializedLinkNode = SerializedLexicalNode & {
    61→  type: 'link'
    62→  url: string
    63→  rel: string | null
    64→  target: string | null
    65→  title: string | null
    66→  children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    67→  direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    68→  format: string
    69→  indent: number
    70→}
    71→
    72→// Text formats (bitwise flags)
    73→export const FORMAT_BOLD = 1
    74→export const FORMAT_ITALIC = 1 << 1
    75→export const FORMAT_STRIKETHROUGH = 1 << 2
    76→export const FORMAT_UNDERLINE = 1 << 3
    77→export const FORMAT_CODE = 1 << 4
    78→export const FORMAT_SUBSCRIPT = 1 << 5
    79→export const FORMAT_SUPERSCRIPT = 1 << 6
    80→export const FORMAT_HIGHLIGHT = 1 << 7
    81→
    82→export function text(content: string, format = 0): SerializedTextNode {
    83→  return {
    84→    detail: 0,
    85→    format,
    86→    mode: 'normal',
    87→    style: '',
    88→    text: content,
    89→    type: 'text',
    90→    version: 1,
    91→  }
    92→}
    93→
    94→export function paragraph(
    95→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    96→): SerializedParagraphNode {
    97→  return {
    98→    children,
    99→    direction: 'ltr',
   100→    format: '',
   101→    indent: 0,
   102→    type: 'paragraph',
   103→    version: 1,
   104→    textFormat: 0,
   105→    textStyle: '',
   106→  }
   107→}
   108→
   109→export function heading(
   110→  tag: 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6',
   111→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   112→): SerializedHeadingNode {
   113→  return {
   114→    children,
   115→    direction: 'ltr',
   116→    format: '',
   117→    indent: 0,
   118→    tag,
   119→    type: 'heading',
   120→    version: 1,
   121→  }
   122→}
   123→
   124→export function quote(
   125→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   126→): SerializedQuoteNode {
   127→  return {
   128→    children,
   129→    direction: 'ltr',
   130→    format: '',
   131→    indent: 0,
   132→    type: 'quote',
   133→    version: 1,
   134→  }
   135→}
   136→
   137→export function list(
   138→  listType: 'bullet' | 'number',
   139→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   140→): SerializedListNode {
   141→  return {
   142→    children,
   143→    direction: 'ltr',
   144→    format: '',
   145→    indent: 0,
   146→    listType,
   147→    start: 1,
   148→    tag: listType === 'bullet' ? 'ul' : 'ol',
   149→    type: 'list',
   150→    version: 1,
   151→  }
   152→}
   153→
   154→export function listItem(
   155→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   156→): SerializedListItemNode {
   157→  return {
   158→    children,
   159→    direction: 'ltr',
   160→    format: '',
   161→    indent: 0,
   162→    type: 'listitem',
   163→    version: 1,
   164→    value: 1,
   165→  }
   166→}
   167→
   168→export function link(
   169→  url: string,
   170→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   171→): SerializedLinkNode {
   172→  return {
   173→    children,
   174→    direction: 'ltr',
   175→    format: '',
   176→    indent: 0,
   177→    type: 'link',
   178→    version: 1,
   179→    rel: null,
   180→    target: null,
   181→    title: null,
   182→    url,
   183→  }
   184→}
   185→
   186→export function horizontalRule() {
   187→  return {
   188→    type: 'horizontalrule',
   189→    version: 1,
   190→  }
   191→}
   192→
   193→export function lineBreak() {
   194→  return {
   195→    type: 'linebreak',
   196→    version: 1,
   197→  }
   198→}
   199→
   200→export function table(...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]) {
   201→  return {
   202→    children,
   203→    direction: 'ltr' as const,
   204→    format: '',
   205→    indent: 0,
   206→    type: 'table',
   207→    version: 1,
   208→  }
   209→}
   210→
   211→export function tableRow(...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]) {
   212→  return {
   213→    children,
   214→    direction: 'ltr' as const,
   215→    format: '',
   216→    indent: 0,
   217→    type: 'tablerow',
   218→    version: 1,
   219→  }
   220→}
   221→
   222→export function tableCell(
   223→  headerState: number,
   224→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   225→) {
   226→  return {
   227→    children,
   228→    colSpan: 1,
   229→    direction: 'ltr' as const,
   230→    format: '',
   231→    headerState,
   232→    indent: 0,
   233→    type: 'tablecell',
   234→    version: 1,
   235→    width: null,
   236→  }
   237→}
   238→
   239→export function alertQuote(
   240→  alertType: string,
   241→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   242→) {
   243→  return {
   244→    type: 'alert-quote',
   245→    alertType,
   246→    content: {
   247→      root: {
   248→        children,
   249→        direction: 'ltr' as const,
   250→        format: '',
   251→        indent: 0,
   252→        type: 'root' as const,
   253→        version: 1,
   254→      },
   255→    },
   256→    version: 1,
   257→  }
   258→}
   259→
   260→export function image(payload: {
   261→  src: string
   262→  altText: string
   263→  width?: number
   264→  height?: number
   265→  caption?: string
   266→  thumbhash?: string
   267→  accent?: string
   268→}) {
   269→  return {
   270→    type: 'image',
   271→    src: payload.src,
   272→    altText: payload.altText,
   273→    width: payload.width,
   274→    height: payload.height,
   275→    caption: payload.caption,
   276→    thumbhash: payload.thumbhash,
   277→    accent: payload.accent,
   278→    version: 1,
   279→  }
   280→}
   281→
   282→export function video(payload: {
   283→  src: string
   284→  poster?: string
   285→  width?: number
   286→  height?: number
   287→}) {
   288→  return {
   289→    type: 'video',
   290→    src: payload.src,
   291→    poster: payload.poster,
   292→    width: payload.width,
   293→    height: payload.height,
   294→    version: 1,
   295→  }
   296→}
   297→
   298→export function mermaid(diagram: string) {
   299→  return {
   300→    type: 'mermaid',
   301→    diagram,
   302→    version: 1,
   303→  }
   304→}
   305→
   306→export function katexBlock(equation: string) {
   307→  return {
   308→    type: 'katex-block',
   309→    equation,
   310→    version: 1,
   311→  }
   312→}
   313→
   314→export function katexInline(equation: string) {
   315→  return {
   316→    type: 'katex-inline',
   317→    equation,
   318→    version: 1,
   319→  }
   320→}
   321→
   322→export function details(
   323→  summary: string,
   324→  open: boolean,
   325→  ...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
   326→) {
   327→  return {
   328→    type: 'details',
   329→    summary,
   330→    open,
   331→    children,
   332→    direction: 'ltr' as const,
   333→    format: '',
   334→    indent: 0,
   335→    version: 1,
   336→  }
   337→}
   338→
   339→export function spoiler(...children: SerializedLexicalNode[]) {
   340→  return {
   341→    type: 'spoiler',
   342→    children,
   343→    direction: 'ltr' as const,
   344→    format: '',
   345→    indent: 0,
   346→    version: 1,
   347→  }
   348→}
   349→
   350→export function footnote(identifier: string) {
   351→  return {
   352→    type: 'footnote',
   353→    identifier,
   354→    version: 1,
   355→  }
   356→}
   357→
   358→export function footnoteSection(definitions: Record<string, string>) {
   359→  return {
   360→    type: 'footnote-section',
   361→    definitions,
   362→    version: 1,
   363→  }
   364→}
   365→
   366→export function mention(
   367→  platform: string,
   368→  handle: string,
   369→  displayName?: string,
   370→) {

   378→}
   379→

   395→      },
   396→    },

   398→  }
```
